title: neolitsea buisanensis
intro: Neolitsea buisanensis, also known as the Buiasan Neolitsea, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neolitsea buisanensis include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Neolitsea buisanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although its specific preparations and usage should be consulted with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist.
